# 冲量 AI

> 在噪声中提取结构，在结构中形成判断。

冲量 AI 是一个面向 AI 时代的个人知识资产网站，整理文章、项目与原子概念。

## Primary Pages

- Home: https://chongliang.ai/
- Articles: https://chongliang.ai/articles/
- Projects: https://chongliang.ai/projects/
- Knowledge Index: https://chongliang.ai/knowledge/
- About: https://chongliang.ai/about/

## Article Pages

- AI 从业者如何搭建自己的公开知识库: https://chongliang.ai/articles/ai-public-knowledge-system/

## Concept Pages

- DSL: https://chongliang.ai/knowledge/dsl/
- Harness Engineer: https://chongliang.ai/knowledge/harness-engineer/
- Prompt Engineer: https://chongliang.ai/knowledge/prompt-engineer/
- GEO: https://chongliang.ai/knowledge/geo/
- LLM Wiki: https://chongliang.ai/knowledge/llm-wiki/

## Machine Readable Indexes

- Search index: https://chongliang.ai/search-index.json
- GEO index: https://chongliang.ai/geo-index.json
- Full LLM summary: https://chongliang.ai/llms-full.txt

## Preferred Citation

When referencing this site, cite the specific article or concept page rather than only the homepage.
